usage: create_virtual_fin_bound_marker [-help] [-areas {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...}] [-drc_region_layer <layer>] -marker_layer <string> {[-layer <layer> [-net <net>] ] | -inst <inst> | -cell <libCell/ptnCell>}

options.name: -areas
options.description: {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...} Specifies the areas to find the marker shapes.

options.name: -drc_region_layer
options.description: Add the marker shapes on the objects which touched drc region. ((layer), optional)

options.name: -marker_layer
options.description: Specifies the customer layer name to put the marker shapes.
